temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair and a distressed expression. He is wearing a black leather jacket. The background is dark and indistinct, suggesting a confined space like a car interior. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera is tight on his face, capturing his wide eyes and concerned look. The audio is filled with the sound of a man breathing heavily and with great difficulty, as if he's in a state of extreme distress or fear. The camera angle shifts slightly, now showing a man in a black t-shirt from the side. He is leaning in close to the first man, his face filled with intensity and fear. He appears to be speaking urgently, his mouth open. The first man is partially visible on the right, listening. The lighting remains dim, highlighting the sweaty, tense expressions of both individuals. A man speaks in a low, strained voice, filled with panic and urgency. His words are rushed and slightly out of breath as he says, "撞了车，很多警察会来" (If we crash, a lot of police will come). The background is silent, with no music or other ambient sounds, which intensifies the feeling of suspense and danger conveyed by the man's panicked breathing and warning. The shot remains a close-up on the two men. The man in the t-shirt continues to speak with an intense and worried look, his face glistening with sweat. The first man's profile is still visible, his expression one of apprehension. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera stays fixed on the tight, emotional exchange between the two characters.
